plugins.name: maccing-growth
plugins.description: Growth toolkit: paid acquisition (Google/Meta/TikTok Ads) + owned messaging (WhatsApp Business Platform), organized into platform/provider groups (meta + platforms/ycloud) with progressive-disclosure references

plugins.name: maccing-notion
plugins.description: Notion API engineering reference: building/editing databases via the data_sources model, formulas (with empirically-verified gotchas), rollups, relations, views/charts, page blocks & positioning, pt-BR number formatting, and debugging Notion API errors — with a mandatory ancestral-AGENTS.md sweep. Ships a self-hosted notion MCP server (Bun, zero-dep)
